metadata.note: Real precompute. P1 = Marqo-FashionCLIP encode(cached_caption) + cosine over caption DB (top-50). P2 = Plan-6 ckpt_epoch16 inference (top-50).

two_tower.note: text2t = Plan-13 text two-tower (ckpt_epoch14); audio2t = Plan-15 audio two-tower (ckpt_epoch17, dev-selected).

presets.modification_text: The dress is a vibrant red, with a deep V-neckline, a cinched waist featuring a tie belt, and side slits for added movement, unlike the pastel pink of the other dress.
presets.mock_transcript: The dress is a vibrant red, with a deep V-neckline, a cinched waist featuring a tie belt, and side slits for added movement, unlike the pastel pink of the other dress.

intermediate.caption: A long red dress with a deep V-neckline, cinched waist, and side slits.

presets.modification_text: The dress is shorter, features a solid gray color with a high neckline and a gathered waist, while lacking patterns and showcasing a subtle sheen.
presets.mock_transcript: The dress is shorter, features a solid gray color with a high neckline and a gathered waist, while lacking patterns and showcasing a subtle sheen.

intermediate.caption: A solid gray dress with a high neckline and gathered waist.

presets.modification_text: The dress is a pastel pink with a smooth, possibly satin-like texture, featuring a modest V-neckline and a straight hemline, in contrast to the two-tone effect and high-low hemline of the other.
presets.mock_transcript: The dress is a pastel pink with a smooth, possibly satin-like texture, featuring a modest V-neckline and a straight hemline, in contrast to the two-tone effect and high-low hemline of the other.

intermediate.caption: A pastel pink dress with a smooth, possibly satin-like texture, featuring a modest V-neckline and a straight hemline.

presets.modification_text: The dress is knee-length with a vibrant royal blue color, featuring a sunburst design and a sleeveless design, while having a smooth, stretchy texture.
presets.mock_transcript: The dress is knee-length with a vibrant royal blue color, featuring a sunburst design and a sleeveless design, while having a smooth, stretchy texture.

intermediate.caption: A vibrant royal blue dress with a sunburst design and a sleeveless design.

presets.modification_text: The dress is shorter, made of a richer dark blue denim, with additional side pockets and visible stitching details, while retaining the classic collar and button-up front.
presets.mock_transcript: The dress is shorter, made of a richer dark blue denim, with additional side pockets and visible stitching details, while retaining the classic collar and button-up front.

intermediate.caption: A dark blue denim dress with a classic collar and button-up front, featuring side pockets and visible stitching details.

presets.modification_text: The dress is a white lace-up shift with a relaxed fit, featuring a square neckline, three-quarter sleeves, and a floral pattern, contrasting the intricate geometric design of the first.
presets.mock_transcript: The dress is a white lace-up shift with a relaxed fit, featuring a square neckline, three-quarter sleeves, and a floral pattern, contrasting the intricate geometric design of the first.

intermediate.caption: A white lace-up shift dress with a relaxed fit, featuring a square neckline, three-quarter sleeves, and a floral pattern.

presets.modification_text: The dress features a high neck and a color block design, contrasting black with navy blue, and is sleeveless, with a possibly silky texture.
presets.mock_transcript: The dress features a high neck and a color block design, contrasting black with navy blue, and is sleeveless, with a possibly silky texture.

intermediate.caption: A sleeveless, high-neck dress with a color block design of black and navy blue.

presets.modification_text: The dress is gray rather than navy blue, features a tie split detail instead of a tie strap, and extends slightly longer below the knee.
presets.mock_transcript: The dress is gray rather than navy blue, features a tie split detail instead of a tie strap, and extends slightly longer below the knee.

intermediate.caption: A close up of a woman wearing a gray dress with a tie split detail and a tie strap.
